char.name: Levi
char.bio: Third son of Leah. Zealous for the family name, sometimes too zealous.

friends.name: Leah
friends.bio: Eldest daughter of Laban, the one Jacob did not choose. But the LORD has seen me, and He fills my arms with sons. 💧

friends.name: Jacob
friends.bio: Younger twin with a strong grip, they call me the heel-grabber. Saw a ladder to heaven once. Still chasing the blessing. 🪜

friends.name: Joseph
friends.bio: Son of Rachel, the dreamer of the family. Had the strangest dream last night about sheaves and stars... ✨

friends.name: Abram
friends.bio: Called to leave my country and my father's house. God promised to make me a great nation.

friends.name: Sarai
friends.bio: Wife of Abram. Following my husband into the unknown. Barren, but keeping faith.

friends.name: Lot
friends.bio: Son of Haran, traveling with my uncle Abram. Looking for well-watered land for my flocks.

friends.name: Isaac
friends.bio: Child of the promise, laughter is in my very name. Walking the land my father was given and trusting the God who provides. 🐑

friends.name: Esau
friends.bio: Firstborn of Isaac. A man of the open field, give me the hunt and the red hills. That stew? Worth it at the time. 🏹

friends.name: Rachel
friends.bio: Shepherdess of Haran. Jacob worked seven years for me, and to him they seemed but a few days for the love he had. 💍

friends.name: Judah
friends.bio: Fourth son of Leah, and this time, I will praise the LORD. Learning my way, for better and for worse. 🦁

friends.name: Pharaoh
friends.bio: Pharaoh, lord of the Two Lands, the living Horus. I dreamed of seven fat cows and seven lean. Who can tell me what it means? 🐄

friends.name: Benjamin
friends.bio: Youngest of the twelve. My mother's last breath named me son of sorrow, but my father calls me son of his right hand.

posts.author: CHAR_178
posts.body: On the third day, when every man in that city was still doubled over in pain from the circumcision and could not so much as lift a blade, Simeon and I went in with our swords, and we killed them. All of them. Every male, Shechem and his father Hamor with the rest, and we took Dinah out of that man's house and carried her home. Then our brothers came in behind us and stripped the place to the bone, the flocks, the herds, the wealth, and they took the women and the little ones. People will say we went too far. Let them say it. I stood and watched a man violate my sister and then try to purchase her from us like livestock. There is no apology anywhere in me. You do not do that to a daughter of Israel and live to brag of it in the city gate.
posts.highlight: Simeon and Levi slaughter the men of Shechem and the brothers plunder the city (Gen 34:25-29)

author_info.name: Levi
author_info.bio: Third son of Leah. Zealous for the family name, sometimes too zealous.
